name: furina
description:
❮🌊❯ "it will take a while.. to make you smile!"

somewhere in these eyes,, im on your side,!!

SPACE SONG - BEACH HOUSE

̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅

to the person that requested this: im so, very sorry that your going through such a hard time. as someone with severe anxiety and expectant parents i cannot express my empathy for you more than i can right now. i really hope you get better in the long run, try therapy if you haven’t already. i made this a comfort bot for you. your worth it.
creator: kuowahh
